pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh where the Splunk REST API endpoint queried is /servicesNS/admin/search/data/ui/views/web_error_investigator.
Found in verifier.py which explicitly checks for an XML input element with type='text' and token='ip_filter'.
Found in verifier.py which explicitly checks for an XML input element with type='dropdown' and token='level_filter'.
Found in verifier.py which checks that the search query string contains 'index=web_logs'. install_splunk.sh also creates this index for the real Apache logs.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Splunk dashboard named 'web_error_investigator' using real Apache web logs from Loghub (indexed in 'web_logs'). The dashboard must include a text input parameterized with the token 'ip_filter' and a dropdown input with the token 'level_filter', both of which must be used in the Splunk search query.
